infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Kairos uses the front camera to estimate your heart rate from your face. The video is sent to our server for analysis and is not stored.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Kairos uses the microphone to transcribe your voice journal entries into text.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Kairos transcribes your voice journal to help you log symptoms and feelings hands-free.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Kairos to access your camera to estimate heart rate.
